items.title: Goldman Sachs Initiates Coverage of UnitedHealth Group (UNH) with Buy Recommendation

Victoria Greene from G Squared Private Wealth said in a recent program on CNBC that UNH could turn around if the company executes. The analyst believes UNH is a cheap stock and made […]

items.title: Humana Loses Court Battle Over Medicare Advantage Ratings, Billions In Payments At Risk
items.description: Texas court rules against Humana, upholding Medicare Advantage bonus cuts and risking billions in insurer revenue tied to star ratings.
